output:
Corrected the extraction after review feedback. `workflow-constants.ts` and `workflow-actors.ts` remain extracted, but engine-level interfaces stay owned by `workflow-machine.ts`.

What was done:
- Kept `src/lib/workflow-types.ts` limited to actor/workflow-boundary types: `DispatchInput`, `DispatchOutput`, and `NullTaskInput`
- Restored `EngineEvent`, `EngineConfig`, `EngineResult`, `EngineError`, and `WorkItem` to `src/lib/workflow-machine.ts`
- Updated `src/lib/workflow-machine.ts` to export/import only dispatch boundary types from `workflow-types.ts`
- Kept `src/lib/workflow-actors.ts` consuming the boundary types without owning engine interfaces
- Left `src/lib/workflow-constants.ts` unchanged as the shared constants module
